an electric field that is directed along the positive
y-axis. What is the direction of the electric force
acting on the proton after it enters the electric

magnitude of the electric field is not known.

entirely within the conductor must equal

is directed parallel to the surface.

conductor is zero.

text:
Which of the following could be true for a Gaussian surface through which the net flux is zero?

I. There are no charges inside the surface.
